title: Jumbo Car Wash Sponge Pack of 4 - Super Absorbent Anti Scratch Cleaning Sponges Multi-use Car Cleaning Sponge Ideal for Wheels, Windscreen, Bodywork
features: Extra Large & Super Absorbent: Jumbo sponges designed for maximum coverage and efficient cleaning of cars, vans, and home surfaces.
Anti Scratch Material: Gentle on paintwork and glass, these sponges clean effectively without leaving marks or scratches.
Versatile Cleaning Uses: Ideal for washing cars, windows, wheels, windscreens, bodywork, and even household chores.
Durable & Long Lasting: Made from high-quality materials to withstand repeated use and maintain shape after multiple washes.
Comfortable Grip: Ergonomic design fits comfortably in your hand, making cleaning quick and effortless.
Vacuum Packed – Soak in water for a few minutes to let the product fully expand to its original shape.
description: Product Description Jumbo Size for Maximum Coverage: Oversized sponge design covers more surface area, making car washing faster and more efficient with fewer passes. Super Absorbent for Quick Cleaning: High-capacity sponge material soaks up water and soap easily, ensuring thorough and streak-free cleaning. Anti-Scratch Surface for Paint Protection: Specially engineered to be gentle on glass and paintwork cleans without causing swirl marks or abrasions. Perfect for Cars, Vans & SUVs: Designed for use on all types of vehicles, including larger bodywork areas like bonnets, roofs, and doors. Safe for Windows, Mirrors & Windscreens: Ideal for removing dirt and grime from glass surfaces without leaving scratches or lint behind. Multipurpose Use Beyond Vehicles: Great for household tasks like cleaning windows, tiles, garden furniture, or outdoor surfaces. Durable and Long-Lasting Construction: Made from high-quality foam that resists tearing and maintains its shape even after repeated use. Comfortable Grip for Effortless Handling: Ergonomic shape fits easily in your hand, helping reduce fatigue during prolonged cleaning sessions. Ideal for Wheels and Lower Bodywork: Flexible design allows for easy access to hard-to-reach areas like wheel arches and bumpers. Use Wet or Soapy for Best Results: Works great with just water or paired with your favorite car shampoo or cleaning solution. Lint-Free and Low Drip Performance: Holds liquid without excessive dripping keeps your cleaning area tidier and more controlled. Gentle Enough for Delicate Finishes: Suitable for use on sensitive finishes, chrome trims, or plastic surfaces without risk of damage. Versatile for Outdoor Equipment Cleaning: Can also be used to clean bicycles, boats, trailers, and garden tools. Great for Professional or Personal Use: Trusted by car care enthusiasts and professionals alike for its quality and reliability. Ideal for DIY Car Care Routines: A must-have tool for at-home car washes, detailing sessions, and weekly maintenance.

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Washing cars, cleaning boats, RVs, motorbikes, and other surfaces
